Education for reconciliation in Sri Lanka: Citizenship Education added to school curriculum (2017); NGO programs: interfaith dialogue, community programs, cultural exchange.
Organizations promoting reconciliation: National Peace Council, Centre for Policy Alternatives, Institute of Policy Studies, Consortium of Humanitarian Agencies, Peace Secretariat for Muslims.

Considering Nike Vaporfly Next% for racing: full-length carbon plate, ZoomX foam, responsive ride. Good for midfoot strikers like user.
Vaporfly Next% fit: runs true to size but snug; narrow heel; midfoot wrap; narrow toe box; 8mm heel-to-toe offset; Flyknit upper.
Vaporfly Next% not ideal for high-mileage training: softer outsole wears faster, ZoomX loses responsiveness over time, limited cushioning for long runs.
For 60-70 miles/week training: Brooks Ghost, Asics Gel-Kayano, New Balance Fresh Foam, Hoka Clifton, Saucony Freedom ISO recommended for durability and cushioning.
Brooks Ghost slightly heavier than some shoes but weight moderate. Runner used to heavier shoes won't notice significant difference in performance.

Selected: Blue Ridge Mountains Landscape Photography Workshop in Asheville, NC (3 days, $649). Led by Tony Sweet.
Instructor Tony Sweet: 30+ years professional photographer/educator, known for creative approach, 20+ years teaching workshops.
Workshop covers: composition, exposure, light/shadow, post-processing. Includes field sessions (sunrise/sunset), classroom, critiques, one-on-one feedback, online forum.
Just got 70-200mm f/2.8 lens; excited to use during workshop. Recommended bring: DSLR/mirrorless, wide-angle (10-22mm), mid-range (24-70mm), telephoto (70-200mm).
Workshop doesn't include lodging. Hotel Indigo Asheville offers $129/night (plus tax) with free Wi-Fi, hot breakfast for workshop participants.
Meals not included but optional group meals during workshop (~$20-30/person). Plenty of Asheville dining options.
Need car to get around; can rent at Asheville Regional Airport. Parking available at hotel. Bring comfortable hiking shoes, sun protection.
Workshop includes group image review, one-on-one feedback from Tony, peer review, post-processing sessions for critique and learning.

Headspace: 14-day free trial, $12.99/month or $94.99/year (or $399.99 lifetime). Student 50% off ($9.99/mo or $79.99/yr). Family plan $19.99/mo or $199.99/yr.
Calm: 7-day free trial, $14.99/month or $69.99/year ($5.83/mo). Student 20% off ($11.99/mo or $55.99/yr). Family $29.99/mo or $149.99/yr.
Choosing Headspace over Calm due to longer 14-day free trial.
Headspace Focus Pack: 10 sessions (10-15 min each) on concentration/attention. Sessions: intro, focal point, noting distractions, task focus, more.
Headspace Daily Focus: personalized daily meditation based on progress/goals. Reminders, progress tracking, variety, goal-based recommendations.
